title: Reinitialize Your Node for Recovery
description: The **recover** RPC command wipes your node and restarts it with the `--recover` option. This is only permitted if the node is unused: no channels, no bitcoin addresses issued (you can use `check` to see if recovery is possible).
For nodes created with v25.12 or later, *hsmsecret* MUST be the 12-word mnemonic.
For earlier nodes, *hsmsecret* is either a codex32 secret starting with "cl1" as returned by `lightning-hsmtool getcodexsecret`, or a raw 64 character hex string.
NOTE: this command only currently works with the `sqlite3` database backend.
Usually a 12-word mnemonic; but for old nodes either a codex32 secret starting with `cl1` as returned by `lightning-hsmtool getcodexsecret` or a raw 64 character hex string.

author: Rusty Russell [rusty@blockstream.com](mailto:rusty@blockstream.com) is mainly responsible.

params.hsmsecret: hockey enroll sure trip track rescue original plug abandon abandon abandon above
hockey enroll sure trip track rescue original plate credit abandon abandon account
